AI Analysis

Insights & Recommendations

Smart analysis based on your week one content performance

🏆
Win
Carousels Own All Engagement
Your carousel (Bank of Mum & Dad) earned 100% of all likes and interactions — 2 likes & 19 views vs 0 interactions for both static images. Prioritise carousel formats for every educational post.
📈
Opportunity
RBA Post Has Strongest View Velocity
The rate hike post achieved a 4.3× view-to-unique-reach ratio — meaning viewers are returning to it. Timely financial news content works. Build a recurring "Rate Watch" series to capitalise on this.
⏰
Timing
Batch Publishing Hurts Algorithm Reach
All 3 posts went live within 96 minutes on a single day (5am–7am UTC / 3–5pm AEDT). Instagram's algorithm penalises post clustering. Spread to Mon / Wed / Fri for consistent cadence and better distribution.
🎬
Growth
Add Reels to Reach Non-Followers
With only 2 followers, Reels are your fastest organic growth lever. Instagram's algorithm surfaces Reels in Explore and non-follower feeds far more than static posts. Aim for 2× Reels per week alongside 2× feed posts.
🎯
Strategy
Strong CTAs — Now Track Them
Every post uses "Link in bio" or "DM us RATE" — excellent practice. Once follower count grows, add UTM parameters to your bio link and monitor profile_links_taps via the Graph API to tie social to conversions.
📅
Recommendation
Build a 4-Pillar Content Calendar
Your 3 posts already hit 3 key pillars: news (RBA), education (staging tips), and empathy (Mum & Dad). Add a 4th — social proof / customer stories. Map these weekly: Reel → Carousel → Image → Story poll.
